```md
# Mobile Header 重设计 — 融合浮片

## Overview

重新设计移动端 Header 导航交互，从当前的底部抽屉（Vaul Drawer）改为「顶部展开融合浮片」——菜单从 header 下方展开，与 header 融合为一张书页浮片卡片。承接桌面端「書写·信纸·光影」设计语言。

## Design Decisions

| 维度 | 决定 |
|------|------|
| 交互模式 | 底部抽屉 → 顶部展开，header 与面板融合为一张浮片卡片 |
| 菜单布局 | 标签横排（chip-style），flex-wrap 自由换行 |
| 子菜单处理 | 分割标签：文字区点击直达，▾ 按钮展开子项（内联展开） |
| 展开动效 | slideDown translateY(-100%)→0，200ms |
| 图标过渡 | Hamburger ☰ 三线 → × 两线，自然旋转过渡 200ms |
| 背景遮罩 | 展开时页面内容加暗遮罩 bg-black/[0.06] |
| 关闭方式 | 点 × 按钮 / 点遮罩 / 导航跳转后自动关闭 |
| Dark mode | 跟随现有 token |
| 桌面端 | 不改（仅影响 mobile < 1024px） |

## Architecture

### 不变的部分

- Header 三栏 Grid 布局（`grid-cols-[4.5rem_auto_4.5rem]`）
- HeaderDataConfigureProvider（动态菜单配置）
- 菜单配置结构（`config.ts` 中 `IHeaderMenu`）
- 桌面端 NavigationMenu（`ForDesktop` 组件）
- 滚动行为逻辑（`useMenuOpacity`、`useHeaderBgOpacity`）
- UserAuth 下拉
- AnimatedLogo

### 改动的部分

#### 1. HeaderDrawerButton → HeaderMobileMenu

替换 `PresentSheet`（Vaul 底部抽屉）为自定义顶部展开面板。不再使用 Vaul 库。

**触发器**：保留圆形按钮，内部图标改为 CSS 三线 hamburger（非 icon font），支持动画过渡。

#### 2. Hamburger ↔ Close 图标动画

三条 CSS 线条（`<span>`），通过 `transform` + `opacity` 过渡：

\```
Open 过渡:
  Top line:    translateY(0) rotate(0)    → translateY(center) rotate(45deg)
  Middle line: opacity(1)                 → opacity(0)
  Bottom line: translateY(0) rotate(0)    → translateY(center) rotate(-45deg)

Duration: 200ms
Easing: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)
\```

#### 3. 融合浮片面板

展开时，header 区域 + 导航面板合并渲染为一张浮片卡片：

\```tsx
// 展开态：header + panel 合为一体
<div className={clsxm(
  'mx-2 rounded-sm',
  'bg-[var(--color-root-bg)] dark:bg-neutral-900',
  'border border-[rgba(200,180,160,0.12)] dark:border-neutral-700/20',
  'shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06),0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]',
  'dark:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)]',
)}>
  {/* Header row: close button + logo + avatar */}
  {/* Navigation tags panel */}
</div>
\```

#### 4. 导航标签

主导航项以标签/chip 形式横排，`flex-wrap` 自然换行：

\```tsx
// 无子菜单的标签：直接链接
<Link href={path} className="px-2.5 py-1.5 text-sm border border-black/[0.04] rounded-[2px]">
  {title}
</Link>

// 有子菜单的分割标签
<div className="flex items-center border border-black/[0.04] rounded-[2px] overflow-hidden">
  <Link href={path} className="px-2.5 py-1.5 text-sm">
    {title}
  </Link>
  <button
    onClick={toggleSubMenu}
    className="px-2 py-1.5 border-l border-black/[0.06] bg-black/[0.015]"
  >
    {isExpanded ? '▴' : '▾'}
  </button>
</div>
\```

活跃项样式（与桌面端一致）：
\```
text-neutral-9 bg-white/55 dark:bg-white/[0.06]
shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] rounded-[2px]
\```

非活跃项：
\```
text-neutral-7 hover:text-neutral-9
\```

#### 5. 子菜单内联展开

点击 ▾ 按钮后，在标签行下方展开子项区域：

\```tsx
// 展开区域
<div className="border-t border-black/[0.03] pt-2 mt-2">
  <div className="text-[7px] uppercase tracking-[2px] text-neutral-4 mb-1.5">
    {sectionTitle}
  </div>
  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
    {subItems.map(item => (
      <Link className="text-xs text-neutral-6 px-2 py-1 bg-black/[0.02] rounded-[2px]">
        {item.title}
      </Link>
    ))}
  </div>
</div>
\```

子项展开动效：height reveal，150ms，同一 easing。

#### 6. 背景遮罩

面板展开时，在浮片卡片后方添加全屏遮罩：

\```
Light: bg-black/[0.06]
Dark:  bg-black/[0.3]
Fade in: opacity 0→1, 150ms
\```

点击遮罩关闭菜单。

#### 7. 展开动效（slideDown）

面板从 header 下方滑入：

\```
translateY(-100%) → translateY(0)
opacity: 0 → 1
Duration: 200ms
Easing: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)
\```

关闭时反向。

## Styling

### 融合浮片卡片

| 元素 | Light | Dark |
|------|-------|------|
| 卡片背景 | `var(--color-root-bg)` (#fefefb) | `neutral-900` |
| 卡片 border | `rgba(200,180,160,0.12)` | `neutral-700/20` |
| 卡片阴影 | `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)` | `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` |
| 卡片圆角 | `rounded-sm` (3px) | same |
| 卡片 margin | `mx-2` (8px) | same |
| Header/panel 分隔 | `border-b border-black/[0.03]` | `border-white/[0.03]` |

### 导航标签

| 元素 | Light | Dark |
|------|-------|------|
| 标签 border | `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` | `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` |
| 标签圆角 | `rounded-[2px]` | same |
| 分割线（▾ 分隔） | `border-l border-black/[0.06]` | `border-white/[0.06]` |
| ▾ 区域背景 | `bg-black/[0.015]` | `bg-white/[0.03]` |
| 活跃标签背景 | `bg-white/55` | `bg-white/[0.06]` |
| 活跃标签文字 | `neutral-9` | `neutral-9`（自动反转） |
| 展开态标签 | `bg-black/[0.02]` + `border-black/[0.08]` | `bg-white/[0.04]` + `border-white/[0.08]` |

### Hamburger 图标

| 属性 | 值 |
|------|------|
| 容器 | `size-10 rounded-full bg-neutral-1` |
| 线条宽度 | 14px |
| 线条高度 | 1.5px |
| 线条颜色 | `neutral-7`（#777） |
| 线条间距 | 4px（hamburger 态） |
| 线条圆角 | `rounded-full` |

### 遮罩

| 元素 | Light | Dark |
|------|-------|------|
| 遮罩色 | `bg-black/[0.06]` | `bg-black/[0.3]` |
| z-index | 浮片卡片 - 1 | same |

## Files to Modify

### 改动

- `apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderDrawerButton.tsx` — 替换 PresentSheet 为自定义面板，实现 hamburger ↔ × 动画
- `apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderDrawerContent.tsx` — 重写为标签横排布局 + 分割标签 + 内联子菜单
- `apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderActionButton.tsx` — 可能需要调整以支持 hamburger 线条子元素

### 不改动

- `Header.tsx` — 结构不变
- `HeaderContent.tsx` — 桌面端不变
- `HeaderArea.tsx` — 布局不变
- `config.ts` — 菜单配置不变
- `HeaderDataConfigureProvider.tsx` — 不变
- `hooks.ts` — 滚动逻辑不变
- `AnimatedLogo.tsx` — 不变
- `UserAuth.tsx` — 不变
- `nav-menu.css` — 不变
- `grid.css` — 不变

### 可能新增

- 无新文件（所有改动在现有文件中完成）

### 可能移除的依赖

- `vaul` — 如果移动端不再使用底部抽屉，且项目中无其他 PresentSheet 使用，可考虑移除。但 PresentSheet 是通用组件，可能在其他地方使用，需确认。

## Out of Scope

- 桌面端 header 样式（已在前次 redesign 中完成）
- 导航菜单项增减
- Logo 样式改动
- 滚动行为逻辑调整
- 移动端底部 TabBar（不在计划中）

```

```text
Now I have all the information needed for a thorough review. Here is my structured assessment.

---

## Spec Review: Mobile Header Redesign — 融合浮片

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-15-mobile-header-redesign-design.md`

---

### CRITICAL Issues

**C1. `neutral-900` violates the neutral color system.**
The spec uses `dark:bg-neutral-900` for the card background (lines 63, 161). Per `CLAUDE.md`, the neutral scale is 1-10 (pure scale, auto-inverts in dark mode), and `neutral-50~950` is explicitly **banned**. The dark root bg is `rgb(28,28,30)` which is `--color-root-bg`. The spec should use `var(--color-root-bg)` for dark mode as well (or `neutral-1` / `neutral-2` from the 1-10 scale). Note: the desktop `HeaderContent.tsx` also uses `dark:bg-neutral-900` (line 122 and 252), so this is an inherited pattern from the existing code — but it contradicts the documented color spec. At minimum, the spec should acknowledge this inconsistency or correct it.

**C2. `neutral-700/20` also uses the banned scale.**
The card border in dark mode is `dark:border-neutral-700/20` (lines 64, 162). Same violation as above. Again inherited from existing desktop header code.

**C3. No `prefers-reduced-motion` handling specified.**
The design language (`design-language.md`, line 57) explicitly requires: "`prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` → disable ALL animations." The spec defines multiple animations (hamburger transition 200ms, slideDown 200ms, height reveal 150ms, overlay fade 150ms) but never mentions reduced-motion behavior. The implementation must disable or skip all of these when the user has requested reduced motion.

---

### IMPORTANT Issues

**I1. No accessibility (a11y) specification.**
The spec provides no guidance on:
- `aria-expanded` on the hamburger button (required for toggle buttons)
- `aria-controls` linking the button to the panel
- `aria-label` for the close/hamburger toggle states
- Focus management: where focus goes when the panel opens and when it closes
- Focus trapping inside the open panel
- `Escape` key to close the panel
- The existing `HeaderDrawerButton` uses `PresentSheet` which via Vaul handles focus trapping, body scroll lock, and Escape key. Replacing it with a custom panel means these must be re-implemented.

**I2. `useSheetContext` dependency in `HeaderDrawerContent.tsx` not addressed.**
The current `HeaderDrawerContent` imports `useSheetContext` from `~/components/ui/sheet/context` (line 7) and uses `dismiss` (line 75) so that link clicks close the drawer. When `PresentSheet` is removed from this flow, the spec needs to define the replacement mechanism for dismissing the panel on navigation. The spec mentions "导航跳转后自动关闭" (line 17) but doesn't specify the implementation approach (new context? callback prop? router event listener?).

**I3. Body scroll lock not mentioned.**
When the mobile menu panel is open, the page content behind the overlay should not be scrollable. `PresentSheet` (via Vaul) handles this automatically. The spec must specify whether and how to implement scroll lock (e.g., `body-scroll-lock` library, CSS `overflow: hidden` on body, etc.).

**I4. "More" menu item has `path: '#'` — how does the split tag handle this?**
The config shows the "More" item has `path: '#'` (a non-navigable path) because it's purely a dropdown container on desktop. The spec's split-tag design (section 4, line 84) renders `<Link href={path}>` for the text area. A `<Link href="#">` would be confusing behavior on mobile. The spec should define special handling for items with no meaningful path.

**I5. Vaul removal safety analysis incomplete.**
The spec notes (line 225) "需确认" whether `PresentSheet` is used elsewhere. The grep shows **8 other files** import `PresentSheet`:
- `KaomojiPanel.tsx`
- `PresentComponentFab.tsx`
- `CommentBlockGutter.tsx`
- `dashboard/Header.tsx`
- `modal/stacked/modal.tsx`
- `FloatPopover.tsx`
- `AsideDonateButton.tsx`

So `PresentSheet` and the `vaul` dependency **cannot be removed**. The spec should explicitly state that `vaul` stays and only the header's usage is replaced.

**I6. `text-[7px]` for section titles is extremely small.**
The sub-menu section title uses `text-[7px]` (line 117). Given the base font is 14px, 7px is half the base size and would be nearly illegible on many devices. The design language specifies section titles at `text-[9px]` (design-language.md, line 29). This should likely be `text-[9px]` to match.

---

### MINOR Issues

**M1. `clsxm` vs `clsx` usage inconsistency in code examples.**
The code sample on line 61 uses `clsxm` but the design language and existing `HeaderActionButton.tsx` use `clsx`. Both exist in the codebase (`clsxm` is from `~/lib/helper`), but the spec should be consistent. Since the existing header components use both, this is stylistic but worth noting.

**M2. Hamburger icon spec says `rounded-full` for line caps.**
Line 189: "线条圆角 | `rounded-full`". This is for the individual hamburger line elements (not a nav container), so it doesn't violate the "no `rounded-full` for nav containers" rule in the design language. But it's worth explicitly noting the distinction since the design language lists `rounded-full` as a don't.

**M3. Mobile breakpoint stated as `< 1024px` but not verified.**
The spec says the changes only affect "mobile < 1024px" (line 19). The existing code uses `useIsMobile()` hook. The spec should confirm this hook uses the same breakpoint, or specify the exact media query to use.

**M4. Easing function alignment is good but duration varies.**
The shared easing `cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)` matches the design language (line 59). However, the spec uses multiple durations (200ms for main slide, 150ms for sub-menu reveal, 150ms for overlay fade) without explaining the rationale for the variation. This is fine functionally but could be documented.

**M5. The `do()` callback on menu items is not mentioned.**
Some config items have a `do` callback (e.g., Posts sets `window.__POST_LIST_ANIMATED__`). The current `HeaderDrawerContent` doesn't call it, and the spec doesn't mention it either. The desktop version calls `section.do` via `onClick`. Consider whether the mobile version should too.

**M6. `search` query parameter handling shown inconsistently.**
The existing `HeaderDrawerContent` (line 32-34) constructs href with search params, but the sub-menu items in `config.ts` already include query params in their `path` (e.g., `/timeline?type=note`). The spec's code samples don't show search param handling for the new tag layout. This is inherited behavior but worth noting to avoid regression.

**M7. External links not addressed.**
The "Warp" sub-menu item has an external URL (`https://travel.moe/go.html`). The spec doesn't specify whether external links should open in a new tab or how they should be visually distinguished in the tag layout.

---

### Summary

The spec is well-structured and aligns with the design language in most areas (easing, card styling, active-item treatment, color tokens for light mode). The core design concept of a "fused floating sheet" is clearly described with concrete CSS values.

The most critical gaps are: (1) use of banned `neutral-50~950` tokens which should be replaced with the 1-10 scale or CSS variables, (2) complete absence of `prefers-reduced-motion` handling which the design language mandates, and (3) missing accessibility specifications for what will be a custom interactive overlay component replacing a library (Vaul) that previously handled these concerns automatically.

     1→# Mobile Header 重设计 — 融合浮片
     2→
     3→## Overview
     4→
     5→重新设计移动端 Header 导航交互，从当前的底部抽屉（Vaul Drawer）改为「顶部展开融合浮片」——菜单从 header 下方展开，与 header 融合为一张书页浮片卡片。承接桌面端「書写·信纸·光影」设计语言。

     8→
     9→| 维度 | 决定 |

    11→| 交互模式 | 底部抽屉 → 顶部展开，header 与面板融合为一张浮片卡片 |
    12→| 菜单布局 | 标签横排（chip-style），flex-wrap 自由换行 |
    13→| 子菜单处理 | 分割标签：文字区点击直达，▾ 按钮展开子项（内联展开） |
    14→| 展开动效 | slideDown translateY(-100%)→0，200ms |
    15→| 图标过渡 | Hamburger ☰ 三线 → × 两线，自然旋转过渡 200ms |
    16→| 背景遮罩 | 展开时页面内容加暗遮罩 bg-black/[0.06] |
    17→| 关闭方式 | 点 × 按钮 / 点遮罩 / 导航跳转后自动关闭 |
    18→| Dark mode | 跟随现有 token |
    19→| 桌面端 | 不改（仅影响 mobile < 1024px） |

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./.claude/skills/design-language.md`

```text
     1→---
     2→name: design-language
     3→description: Use when designing or implementing UI components, pages, or visual changes in Shiroi. Triggers on layout decisions, color choices, animation design, typography, hover states, dark mode, or any visual/style work.
     4→---
     5→
     6→# 書写·信纸·光影 Design Language
     7→
     8→Shiroi 整站以**个人书写**为隐喻。页面如一封展开的信纸，元素如手帐般散落，追求散文式自由感而非对称网格。
     9→
    10→## Color System
    11→
    12→| Layer | Light | Dark |
    13→|-------|-------|------|
    14→| Accent | 浅葱 `#33A6B8` | 桃 `#F596AA` |
    15→| Root bg | `#fefefb` (`--color-root-bg`) | `rgb(28,28,30)` |
    16→| Text | `neutral-1→10` 正序 | `neutral-1→10` 反转（`variables.css`） |
    17→| Light spots | warm `rgba(255,228,180,0.35)` | cold `rgba(180,200,255,0.15)` |
    18→| Decorative | accent at 6-15% opacity | same, lower opacity |
    19→| Borders/dividers | `rgba(0,0,0,0.04~0.06)` | `neutral-700~800` |
    20→
    21→- Dynamic accent via `--color-accent` CSS var (OKLCH available)
    22→- Dark mode: follow existing tokens, no extra `dark:` for text (neutral-* auto-inverts)
    23→- Cards: `dark:bg-white/5`
    24→
    25→## Typography
    26→
    27→| Element | Font | Size | Style | Color |
    28→|---------|------|------|-------|-------|
    29→| Section title | sans | `text-[9px]` | uppercase tracking-[4px] | neutral-4 |
    30→| Main heading | serif | inherit | letter-spacing 5-6px | neutral-9~10 |
    31→| Body/summary | sans | text-xs~sm | normal | neutral-5~7 |
    32→| Marginal notes | serif | text-xs | italic | neutral-3~4 |
    33→| Date/month | serif | text-[8-9px] | italic | neutral-3 |
    34→| P.S./quotes | serif | text-xs | italic | neutral-4~5 |
    35→| Hover links | — | — | — | → neutral-9 (not accent) |
    36→
    37→Base font: 14px (`html { font-size: 14px }`).
    38→
    39→## Animation Hierarchy
    40→
    41→### 1. Mount entry (first visit only)
    42→- `sessionStorage('hero-entered')` marks return visits
    43→- Hero anchors the sequence; SecondScreen continues at ~0.95s delay
    44→- Return visit: skip entry, show immediately
    45→
    46→### 2. Scroll-driven (every visit)
    47→- CSS Scroll-Driven Animations API (`animation-timeline: view()`)
    48→- `@supports` feature detection; Safari fallback = show immediately
    49→- Rhythm: slow → medium → fast (Hero parallax → SecondScreen unfold → Timeline stagger → Windsock snap)
    50→- All CSS classes in `animation.css`
    51→
    52→### 3. Idle breathing (desktop only)
    53→- CSS keyframes, amplitude ±2-3px, period 12-18s
    54→- No JS drivers
    55→
    56→### Constraints
    57→- `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` → disable ALL animations
    58→- Mobile: no 3D perspective (no rotateX), simplify to translateY + opacity
    59→- Shared easing: `cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)`
    60→
    61→## Layout
    62→
    63→- **Desktop (lg+):** free positioning or flex multi-column, max-w `1400px`, horizontal padding `px-6 lg:px-12 xl:px-16 2xl:px-24`
    64→- **Mobile (<lg):** linear vertical flow (flex-col), uniform spacing 24px, no fold/crease concepts
    65→- Sections flow naturally without hard dividers; Hero light spots can overflow into SecondScreen
    66→- Empty columns auto-hide; flex fills remaining space
    67→
    68→## Interaction Patterns
    69→
    70→| Context | Treatment |
    71→|---------|-----------|
    72→| Link/title hover | `color → neutral-9`, transition 0.3s |
    73→| Nav active item | neutral-9 text + white float layer (bg-white/55 + shadow), NOT accent |
    74→| Card hover | `box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` |
    75→| Number animation | `NumberSmoothTransition` counting effect |
    76→| Divider lines | gradient fade (both ends transparent, middle low-opacity) |
    77→| Dropdown hover | `hover:bg-black/[0.02]` (not accent) |
    78→
    79→## Component Rules
    80→
    81→- Inline sub-components in parent file; **split only if >80 lines**
    82→- Max 500 lines/file, React components <300 lines
    83→- Edge case trinity: Loading → skeleton, Empty → hide section, Error → ErrorBoundary hide
    84→- Use `clsx` / `clsxm` for class composition
    85→- `'use client'` directive for client components
    86→
    87→## Don'ts
    88→
    89→- Never use accent color for active nav items or dropdown hovers
    90→- Never use `rounded-full` for nav containers (pill shape removed)
    91→- Never use glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur`) for dropdown popups
    92→- Never hardcode colors that should use CSS variables
    93→- Never add 3D perspective effects on mobile
    94→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→import { memo, useCallback } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { useSheetContext } from '~/components/ui/sheet/context'
     8→import { reboundPreset } from '~/constants/spring'
     9→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    10→
    11→import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'
    12→import { useHeaderConfig } from './HeaderDataConfigureProvider'
    13→
    14→export const HeaderDrawerContent = () => {
    15→  const { config } = useHeaderConfig()
    16→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    17→
    18→  const getTitle = useCallback(
    19→    (item: IHeaderMenu) => {
    20→      if (item.titleKey) {
    21→        return t(item.titleKey as any)
    22→      }
    23→      return item.title
    24→    },
    25→    [t],
    26→  )
    27→
    28→  return (
    29→    <div className="scrollbar-none mt-12 max-h-[80dvh] w-[90vw] space-y-4 overflow-auto pb-24">
    30→      {config.map((section, index) => {
    31→        let href = section.path
    32→        if (section.search) {
    33→          href += `?${new URLSearchParams(section.search).toString()}`
    34→        }
    35→
    36→        return (
    37→          <m.section
    38→            animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
    39→            initial={{ y: 30, opacity: 0 }}
    40→            key={href}
    41→            transition={{
    42→              ...reboundPreset,
    43→              delay: index * 0.08,
    44→            }}
    45→          >
    46→            <LinkInternal className="block" href={href}>
    47→              <span className="flex items-center space-x-2 py-2 text-lg">
    48→                <i>{section.icon}</i>
    49→                <h2>{getTitle(section)}</h2>
    50→              </span>
    51→            </LinkInternal>
    52→
    53→            {section.subMenu && (
    54→              <ul className="my-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
    55→                {section.subMenu.map((sub) => (
    56→                  <li key={sub.path}>
    57→                    <LinkInternal className="inline-block p-2" href={sub.path}>
    58→                      {getTitle(sub)}
    59→                    </LinkInternal>
    60→                  </li>
    61→                ))}
    62→              </ul>
    63→            )}
    64→          </m.section>
    65→        )
    66→      })}
    67→    </div>
    68→  )
    69→}
    70→
    71→const LinkInternal: typeof Link = memo(function LinkInternal({
    72→  children,
    73→  ...rest
    74→}) {
    75→  const { dismiss } = useSheetContext()
    76→  return (
    77→    <Link {...rest} onClick={dismiss}>
    78→      {children}
    79→    </Link>
    80→  )
    81→})
    82→

 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/sheet/Sheet.tsx`

```text
     1→import { atom, useStore } from 'jotai'
     2→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren, ReactNode } from 'react'
     3→import * as React from 'react'
     4→import { useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     5→import { Drawer } from 'vaul'
     6→
     7→import { SheetContext } from './context'
     8→
     9→export interface PresentSheetProps {
    10→  content: ReactNode | FC
    11→  defaultOpen?: boolean
    12→  dismissible?: boolean
    13→  onOpenChange?: (value: boolean) => void
    14→  open?: boolean
    15→  title?: ReactNode
    16→  triggerAsChild?: boolean
    17→
    18→  zIndex?: number
    19→}
    20→
    21→export const sheetStackAtom = atom([] as HTMLDivElement[])
    22→
    23→export type SheetRef = {
    24→  dismiss: () => void
    25→}
    26→
    27→export const PresentSheet = ({
    28→  ref,
    29→  ...props
    30→}: PropsWithChildren<PresentSheetProps> & {
    31→  ref?: React.RefObject<SheetRef | null>
    32→}) => {
    33→  const {
    34→    content,
    35→    children,
    36→    zIndex = 1000,
    37→    title,
    38→    dismissible = true,
    39→    defaultOpen,
    40→    triggerAsChild,
    41→  } = props
    42→
    43→  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(props.open ?? defaultOpen)
    44→
    45→  useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    46→    dismiss: () => {
    47→      setIsOpen(false)
    48→    },
    49→  }))
    50→
    51→  const nextRootProps = useMemo(() => {
    52→    const nextProps = {
    53→      onOpenChange: setIsOpen,
    54→    } as any
    55→    if (isOpen !== undefined) {
    56→      nextProps.open = isOpen
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    if (props.onOpenChange !== undefined) {
    60→      nextProps.onOpenChange = (v: boolean) => {
    61→        setIsOpen(v)
    62→        props.onOpenChange?.(v)
    63→      }
    64→    }
    65→
    66→    return nextProps
    67→  }, [props, isOpen, setIsOpen])
    68→
    69→  useEffect(() => {
    70→    if (props.open !== undefined) {
    71→      setIsOpen(props.open)
    72→    }
    73→  }, [props.open])
    74→  const [holderRef, setHolderRef] = useState<HTMLDivElement | null>()
    75→  const store = useStore()
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    const holder = holderRef
    79→    if (!holder) return
    80→    store.set(sheetStackAtom, (p) => p.concat(holder))
    81→
    82→    return () => {
    83→      store.set(sheetStackAtom, (p) => p.filter((item) => item !== holder))
    84→    }
    85→  }, [holderRef, store])
    86→
    87→  const { Root } = Drawer
    88→
    89→  const overlayZIndex = zIndex - 1
    90→  const contentZIndex = zIndex
    91→
    92→  return (
    93→    <Root dismissible={dismissible} {...nextRootProps}>
    94→      {!!children && (
    95→        <Drawer.Trigger asChild={triggerAsChild}>{children}</Drawer.Trigger>
    96→      )}
    97→      <Drawer.Portal>
    98→        <Drawer.Content
    99→          className="fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 flex max-h-[calc(100svh-5rem)] flex-col rounded-t-[10px] bg-neutral-1 p-4"
   100→          style={{
   101→            zIndex: contentZIndex,
   102→          }}
   103→        >
   104→          {dismissible && (
   105→            <div className="mx-auto mb-8 h-1.5 w-12 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-neutral-4" />
   106→          )}
   107→
   108→          {title && (
   109→            <Drawer.Title className="-mt-4 mb-4 flex justify-center text-lg font-medium">
   110→              {title}
   111→            </Drawer.Title>
   112→          )}
   113→
   114→          <SheetContext
   115→            value={useMemo(
   116→              () => ({
   117→                dismiss() {
   118→                  setIsOpen(false)
   119→                },
   120→              }),
   121→              [setIsOpen],
   122→            )}
   123→          >
   124→            {typeof content === 'function'
   125→              ? React.createElement(content)
   126→              : content}
   127→          </SheetContext>
   128→          <div ref={setHolderRef} />
   129→        </Drawer.Content>
   130→        <Drawer.Overlay
   131→          className="fixed inset-0 bg-neutral-9/40"
   132→          style={{
   133→            zIndex: overlayZIndex,
   134→          }}
   135→        />
   136→      </Drawer.Portal>
   137→    </Root>
   138→  )
   139→}
   140→
```
</details></tool-use>

    66→
    67→const AnimatedMenu: Component = ({ children }) => {

   142→            ) ?? -1
   143→
   144→          const isActive =

   146→            (pathname.startsWith(`${section.path}/`) &&

   148→            subItemActive > -1 ||
   149→            false
   150→
   151→          const activeSubItem = section.subMenu?.[subItemActive]

   153→          let href = section.path

   205→                  )}
   206→                  render={

   212→                  }
   213→                >

Now I have all the information needed for a thorough review. Here is my structured assessment.

---

## Spec Review: Mobile Header Redesign — 融合浮片

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-15-mobile-header-redesign-design.md`

---

### CRITICAL Issues

**C1. `neutral-900` violates the neutral color system.**
The spec uses `dark:bg-neutral-900` for the card background (lines 63, 161). Per `CLAUDE.md`, the neutral scale is 1-10 (pure scale, auto-inverts in dark mode), and `neutral-50~950` is explicitly **banned**. The dark root bg is `rgb(28,28,30)` which is `--color-root-bg`. The spec should use `var(--color-root-bg)` for dark mode as well (or `neutral-1` / `neutral-2` from the 1-10 scale). Note: the desktop `HeaderContent.tsx` also uses `dark:bg-neutral-900` (line 122 and 252), so this is an inherited pattern from the existing code — but it contradicts the documented color spec. At minimum, the spec should acknowledge this inconsistency or correct it.

**C2. `neutral-700/20` also uses the banned scale.**
The card border in dark mode is `dark:border-neutral-700/20` (lines 64, 162). Same violation as above. Again inherited from existing desktop header code.

**C3. No `prefers-reduced-motion` handling specified.**
The design language (`design-language.md`, line 57) explicitly requires: "`prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` → disable ALL animations." The spec defines multiple animations (hamburger transition 200ms, slideDown 200ms, height reveal 150ms, overlay fade 150ms) but never mentions reduced-motion behavior. The implementation must disable or skip all of these when the user has requested reduced motion.

---

### IMPORTANT Issues

**I1. No accessibility (a11y) specification.**
The spec provides no guidance on:
- `aria-expanded` on the hamburger button (required for toggle buttons)
- `aria-controls` linking the button to the panel
- `aria-label` for the close/hamburger toggle states
- Focus management: where focus goes when the panel opens and when it closes
- Focus trapping inside the open panel
- `Escape` key to close the panel
- The existing `HeaderDrawerButton` uses `PresentSheet` which via Vaul handles focus trapping, body scroll lock, and Escape key. Replacing it with a custom panel means these must be re-implemented.

**I2. `useSheetContext` dependency in `HeaderDrawerContent.tsx` not addressed.**
The current `HeaderDrawerContent` imports `useSheetContext` from `~/components/ui/sheet/context` (line 7) and uses `dismiss` (line 75) so that link clicks close the drawer. When `PresentSheet` is removed from this flow, the spec needs to define the replacement mechanism for dismissing the panel on navigation. The spec mentions "导航跳转后自动关闭" (line 17) but doesn't specify the implementation approach (new context? callback prop? router event listener?).

**I3. Body scroll lock not mentioned.**
When the mobile menu panel is open, the page content behind the overlay should not be scrollable. `PresentSheet` (via Vaul) handles this automatically. The spec must specify whether and how to implement scroll lock (e.g., `body-scroll-lock` library, CSS `overflow: hidden` on body, etc.).

**I4. "More" menu item has `path: '#'` — how does the split tag handle this?**
The config shows the "More" item has `path: '#'` (a non-navigable path) because it's purely a dropdown container on desktop. The spec's split-tag design (section 4, line 84) renders `<Link href={path}>` for the text area. A `<Link href="#">` would be confusing behavior on mobile. The spec should define special handling for items with no meaningful path.

**I5. Vaul removal safety analysis incomplete.**
The spec notes (line 225) "需确认" whether `PresentSheet` is used elsewhere. The grep shows **8 other files** import `PresentSheet`:
- `KaomojiPanel.tsx`
- `PresentComponentFab.tsx`
- `CommentBlockGutter.tsx`
- `dashboard/Header.tsx`
- `modal/stacked/modal.tsx`
- `FloatPopover.tsx`
- `AsideDonateButton.tsx`

So `PresentSheet` and the `vaul` dependency **cannot be removed**. The spec should explicitly state that `vaul` stays and only the header's usage is replaced.

**I6. `text-[7px]` for section titles is extremely small.**
The sub-menu section title uses `text-[7px]` (line 117). Given the base font is 14px, 7px is half the base size and would be nearly illegible on many devices. The design language specifies section titles at `text-[9px]` (design-language.md, line 29). This should likely be `text-[9px]` to match.

---

### MINOR Issues

**M1. `clsxm` vs `clsx` usage inconsistency in code examples.**
The code sample on line 61 uses `clsxm` but the design language and existing `HeaderActionButton.tsx` use `clsx`. Both exist in the codebase (`clsxm` is from `~/lib/helper`), but the spec should be consistent. Since the existing header components use both, this is stylistic but worth noting.

**M2. Hamburger icon spec says `rounded-full` for line caps.**
Line 189: "线条圆角 | `rounded-full`". This is for the individual hamburger line elements (not a nav container), so it doesn't violate the "no `rounded-full` for nav containers" rule in the design language. But it's worth explicitly noting the distinction since the design language lists `rounded-full` as a don't.

**M3. Mobile breakpoint stated as `< 1024px` but not verified.**
The spec says the changes only affect "mobile < 1024px" (line 19). The existing code uses `useIsMobile()` hook. The spec should confirm this hook uses the same breakpoint, or specify the exact media query to use.

**M4. Easing function alignment is good but duration varies.**
The shared easing `cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)` matches the design language (line 59). However, the spec uses multiple durations (200ms for main slide, 150ms for sub-menu reveal, 150ms for overlay fade) without explaining the rationale for the variation. This is fine functionally but could be documented.

**M5. The `do()` callback on menu items is not mentioned.**
Some config items have a `do` callback (e.g., Posts sets `window.__POST_LIST_ANIMATED__`). The current `HeaderDrawerContent` doesn't call it, and the spec doesn't mention it either. The desktop version calls `section.do` via `onClick`. Consider whether the mobile version should too.

**M6. `search` query parameter handling shown inconsistently.**
The existing `HeaderDrawerContent` (line 32-34) constructs href with search params, but the sub-menu items in `config.ts` already include query params in their `path` (e.g., `/timeline?type=note`). The spec's code samples don't show search param handling for the new tag layout. This is inherited behavior but worth noting to avoid regression.

**M7. External links not addressed.**
The "Warp" sub-menu item has an external URL (`https://travel.moe/go.html`). The spec doesn't specify whether external links should open in a new tab or how they should be visually distinguished in the tag layout.

---

### Summary

The spec is well-structured and aligns with the design language in most areas (easing, card styling, active-item treatment, color tokens for light mode). The core design concept of a "fused floating sheet" is clearly described with concrete CSS values.

The most critical gaps are: (1) use of banned `neutral-50~950` tokens which should be replaced with the 1-10 scale or CSS variables, (2) complete absence of `prefers-reduced-motion` handling which the design language mandates, and (3) missing accessibility specifications for what will be a custom interactive overlay component replacing a library (Vaul) that previously handled these concerns automatically.

Base directory for this skill: <HOME>/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/superpowers/5.0.2/skills/writing-plans

# Writing Plans

## Overview

Write comprehensive implementation plans assuming the engineer has zero context for our codebase and questionable taste. Document everything they need to know: which files to touch for each task, code, testing, docs they might need to check, how to test it. Give them the whole plan as bite-sized tasks. DRY. YAGNI. TDD. Frequent commits.

Assume they are a skilled developer, but know almost nothing about our toolset or problem domain. Assume they don't know good test design very well.

**Announce at start:** "I'm using the writing-plans skill to create the implementation plan."

**Context:** This should be run in a dedicated worktree (created by brainstorming skill).

**Save plans to:** `docs/superpowers/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<feature-name>.md`
- (User preferences for plan location override this default)

## Scope Check

If the spec covers multiple independent subsystems, it should have been broken into sub-project specs during brainstorming. If it wasn't, suggest breaking this into separate plans — one per subsystem. Each plan should produce working, testable software on its own.

## File Structure

Before defining tasks, map out which files will be created or modified and what each one is responsible for. This is where decomposition decisions get locked in.

- Design units with clear boundaries and well-defined interfaces. Each file should have one clear responsibility.
- You reason best about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more reliable when files are focused. Prefer smaller, focused files over large ones that do too much.
- Files that change together should live together. Split by responsibility, not by technical layer.
- In existing codebases, follow established patterns. If the codebase uses large files, don't unilaterally restructure - but if a file you're modifying has grown unwieldy, including a split in the plan is reasonable.

This structure informs the task decomposition. Each task should produce self-contained changes that make sense independently.

## Bite-Sized Task Granularity

**Each step is one action (2-5 minutes):**
- "Write the failing test" - step
- "Run it to make sure it fails" - step
- "Implement the minimal code to make the test pass" - step
- "Run the tests and make sure they pass" - step
- "Commit" - step

## Plan Document Header

**Every plan MUST start with this header:**

```markdown
# [Feature Name] Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (if subagents available) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** [One sentence describing what this builds]

**Architecture:** [2-3 sentences about approach]

**Tech Stack:** [Key technologies/libraries]

---
```

## Task Structure

````markdown
### Task N: [Component Name]

**Files:**
- Create: `exact/path/to/file.py`
- Modify: `exact/path/to/existing.py:123-145`
- Test: `tests/exact/path/to/test.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing test**

```python
def test_specific_behavior():
    result = function(input)
    assert result == expected
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run test to verify it fails**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: FAIL with "function not defined"

- [ ] **Step 3: Write minimal implementation**

```python
def function(input):
    return expected
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Run test to verify it passes**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: PASS

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add tests/path/test.py src/path/file.py
git commit -m "feat: add specific feature"
```
````

## Remember
- Exact file paths always
- Complete code in plan (not "add validation")
- Exact commands with expected output
- Reference relevant skills with @ syntax
- DRY, YAGNI, TDD, frequent commits

## Plan Review Loop

After completing each chunk of the plan:

1. Dispatch plan-document-reviewer subagent (see plan-document-reviewer-prompt.md) with precisely crafted review context — never your session history. This keeps the reviewer focused on the plan, not your thought process.
   - Provide: chunk content, path to spec document
2. If ❌ Issues Found:
   - Fix the issues in the chunk
   - Re-dispatch reviewer for that chunk
   - Repeat until ✅ Approved
3. If ✅ Approved: proceed to next chunk (or execution handoff if last chunk)

**Chunk boundaries:** Use `## Chunk N: <name>` headings to delimit chunks. Each chunk should be ≤1000 lines and logically self-contained.

**Review loop guidance:**
- Same agent that wrote the plan fixes it (preserves context)
- If loop exceeds 5 iterations, surface to human for guidance
- Reviewers are advisory - explain disagreements if you believe feedback is incorrect

## Execution Handoff

After saving the plan:

**"Plan complete and saved to `docs/superpowers/plans/<filename>.md`. Ready to execute?"**

**Execution path depends on harness capabilities:**

**If harness has subagents (Claude Code, etc.):**
- **REQUIRED:** Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- Do NOT offer a choice - subagent-driven is the standard approach
- Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review

**If harness does NOT have subagents:**
- Execute plan in current session using superpowers:executing-plans
- Batch execution with checkpoints for review

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-15-mobile-header-redesign-design.md`

```text
     1→# Mobile Header 重设计 — 融合浮片
     2→
     3→## Overview
     4→
     5→重新设计移动端 Header 导航交互，从当前的底部抽屉（Vaul Drawer）改为「顶部展开融合浮片」——菜单从 header 下方展开，与 header 融合为一张书页浮片卡片。承接桌面端「書写·信纸·光影」设计语言。
     6→
     7→## Design Decisions
     8→
     9→| 维度 | 决定 |
    10→|------|------|
    11→| 交互模式 | 底部抽屉 → 顶部展开，header 与面板融合为一张浮片卡片 |
    12→| 菜单布局 | 标签横排（chip-style），flex-wrap 自由换行 |
    13→| 子菜单处理 | 分割标签：文字区点击直达，▾ 按钮展开子项（内联展开） |
    14→| 展开动效 | slideDown translateY(-100%)→0，200ms |
    15→| 图标过渡 | Hamburger ☰ 三线 → × 两线，自然旋转过渡 200ms |
    16→| 背景遮罩 | 展开时页面内容加暗遮罩 bg-black/[0.06] |
    17→| 关闭方式 | 点 × 按钮 / 点遮罩 / 导航跳转后自动关闭 |
    18→| Dark mode | 跟随现有 token |
    19→| 桌面端 | 不改（仅影响 mobile < 1024px，`useIsMobile()` hook） |
    20→| 减弱动效 | `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` 时禁用所有动画，直接显示/隐藏 |
    21→| Vaul | 仅 header 不再使用，`PresentSheet` 通用组件保留（其他模块仍在用） |
    22→
    23→## Architecture
    24→
    25→### 不变的部分
    26→
    27→- Header 三栏 Grid 布局（`grid-cols-[4.5rem_auto_4.5rem]`）
    28→- HeaderDataConfigureProvider（动态菜单配置）
    29→- 菜单配置结构（`config.ts` 中 `IHeaderMenu`）
    30→- 桌面端 NavigationMenu（`ForDesktop` 组件）
    31→- 滚动行为逻辑（`useMenuOpacity`、`useHeaderBgOpacity`）
    32→- UserAuth 下拉
    33→- AnimatedLogo
    34→
    35→### 改动的部分
    36→
    37→#### 1. HeaderDrawerButton → HeaderMobileMenu
    38→
    39→替换 `PresentSheet`（Vaul 底部抽屉）为自定义顶部展开面板。仅 header 不再使用 PresentSheet，`vaul` 依赖保留（KaomojiPanel、CommentBlockGutter、AsideDonateButton 等仍在用）。
    40→
    41→**触发器**：保留圆形按钮，内部图标改为 CSS 三线 hamburger（非 icon font），支持动画过渡。
    42→
    43→#### 2. Hamburger ↔ Close 图标动画
    44→
    45→三条 CSS 线条（`<span>`），通过 `transform` + `opacity` 过渡：
    46→
    47→```
    48→Open 过渡:
    49→  Top line:    translateY(0) rotate(0)    → translateY(center) rotate(45deg)
    50→  Middle line: opacity(1)                 → opacity(0)
    51→  Bottom line: translateY(0) rotate(0)    → translateY(center) rotate(-45deg)
    52→
    53→Duration: 200ms
    54→Easing: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)
    55→```
    56→
    57→#### 3. 融合浮片面板
    58→
    59→展开时，header 区域 + 导航面板合并渲染为一张浮片卡片：
    60→
    61→```tsx
    62→// 展开态：header + panel 合为一体
    63→<div className={clsxm(
    64→  'mx-2 rounded-sm',
    65→  'bg-[var(--color-root-bg)] dark:bg-neutral-900',
    66→  'border border-[rgba(200,180,160,0.12)] dark:border-neutral-700/20',
    67→  'shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06),0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]',
    68→  'dark:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)]',
    69→)}>
    70→  {/* Header row: close button + logo + avatar */}
    71→  {/* Navigation tags panel */}
    72→</div>
    73→```
    74→
    75→#### 4. 导航标签
    76→
    77→主导航项以标签/chip 形式横排，`flex-wrap` 自然换行：
    78→
    79→```tsx
    80→// 无子菜单的标签：直接链接
    81→<Link href={path} className="px-2.5 py-1.5 text-sm border border-black/[0.04] rounded-[2px]">
    82→  {title}
    83→</Link>
    84→
    85→// 有子菜单的分割标签
    86→<div className="flex items-center border border-black/[0.04] rounded-[2px] overflow-hidden">
    87→  <Link href={path} className="px-2.5 py-1.5 text-sm">
    88→    {title}
    89→  </Link>
    90→  <button
    91→    onClick={toggleSubMenu}
    92→    className="px-2 py-1.5 border-l border-black/[0.06] bg-black/[0.015]"
    93→  >
    94→    {isExpanded ? '▴' : '▾'}
    95→  </button>
    96→</div>
    97→```
    98→
    99→活跃项样式（与桌面端一致）：
   100→```
   101→text-neutral-9 bg-white/55 dark:bg-white/[0.06]
   102→shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] rounded-[2px]
   103→```
   104→
   105→非活跃项：
   106→```
   107→text-neutral-7 hover:text-neutral-9
   108→```
   109→
   110→#### 5. 子菜单内联展开
   111→
   112→点击 ▾ 按钮后，在标签行下方展开子项区域：
   113→
   114→```tsx
   115→// 展开区域
   116→<div className="border-t border-black/[0.03] pt-2 mt-2">
   117→  <div className="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[2px] text-neutral-4 mb-1.5">
   118→    {sectionTitle}
   119→  </div>
   120→  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
   121→    {subItems.map(item => (
   122→      <Link className="text-xs text-neutral-6 px-2 py-1 bg-black/[0.02] rounded-[2px]">
   123→        {item.title}
   124→      </Link>
   125→    ))}
   126→  </div>
   127→</div>
   128→```
   129→
   130→子项展开动效：height reveal，150ms，同一 easing。
   131→
   132→#### 6. 背景遮罩
   133→
   134→面板展开时，在浮片卡片后方添加全屏遮罩：
   135→
   136→```
   137→Light: bg-black/[0.06]
   138→Dark:  bg-black/[0.3]
   139→Fade in: opacity 0→1, 150ms
   140→```
   141→
   142→点击遮罩关闭菜单。
   143→
   144→#### 7. 展开动效（slideDown）
   145→
   146→面板从 header 下方滑入：
   147→
   148→```
   149→translateY(-100%) → translateY(0)
   150→opacity: 0 → 1
   151→Duration: 200ms
   152→Easing: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)
   153→```
   154→
   155→关闭时反向。
   156→
   157→#### 8. 无障碍与键盘交互
   158→
   159→替换 Vaul 后需自行处理以下 a11y 职责：
   160→
   161→- Hamburger 按钮：`aria-expanded={isOpen}`、`aria-controls="mobile-nav-panel"`、`aria-label` 随状态切换（"打开菜单" / "关闭菜单"）
   162→- 面板容器：`id="mobile-nav-panel"`、`role="dialog"`
   163→- **焦点管理**：展开时焦点移入面板第一个可聚焦元素；关闭时焦点回到 hamburger 按钮
   164→- **Escape 键**：按 Escape 关闭面板
   165→- **Body scroll lock**：展开时 `document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'`，关闭时恢复
   166→
   167→#### 9. prefers-reduced-motion
   168→
   169→```css
   170→@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
   171→  /* 所有动画跳过，直接显示/隐藏 */
   172→  transition: none !important;
   173→  animation: none !important;
   174→}
   175→```
   176→
   177→Hamburger 图标、slideDown、overlay fade、子菜单 reveal 均受此约束。
   178→
   179→#### 10. 特殊 path 处理
   180→
   181→- `path: '#'`（More 菜单项）：文字区不渲染为 `<Link>`，改为 `<button>` 或 `<span>`，点击时直接展开子菜单（等效于点 ▾）
   182→- 外部链接（如 Warp `https://travel.moe/...`）：渲染为 `<a target="_blank" rel="noopener">`
   183→- `section.do` 回调：导航标签 onClick 中调用（与桌面端一致）
   184→- `section.search` 参数：拼接到 href（与现有 HeaderDrawerContent 逻辑一致）
   185→
   186→#### 11. 面板关闭机制
   187→
   188→替换 `useSheetContext().dismiss()`，新建轻量 context：
   189→
   190→```tsx
   191→const MobileMenuContext = createContext({ close: () => {} })
   192→
   193→// 导航标签内使用
   194→const { close } = use(MobileMenuContext)
   195→<Link href={path} onClick={close}>
   196→```
   197→
   198→路由跳转后自动关闭面板（通过 `usePathname()` 变化检测或 onClick 直接触发 close）。
   199→
   200→## Styling
   201→
   202→### 融合浮片卡片
   203→
   204→| 元素 | Light | Dark |
   205→|------|-------|------|
   206→| 卡片背景 | `var(--color-root-bg)` (#fefefb) | `neutral-900` |
   207→| 卡片 border | `rgba(200,180,160,0.12)` | `neutral-700/20` |

   209→| 卡片圆角 | `rounded-sm` (3px) | same |
   210→| 卡片 margin | `mx-2` (8px) | same |
   211→| Header/panel 分隔 | `border-b border-black/[0.03]` | `border-white/[0.03]` |
   212→
   213→### 导航标签

   215→| 元素 | Light | Dark |
   216→|------|-------|------|
   217→| 标签 border | `rgba(0,0,0,0.04)` | `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)` |
   218→| 标签圆角 | `rounded-[2px]` | same |
   219→| 分割线（▾ 分隔） | `border-l border-black/[0.06]` | `border-white/[0.06]` |
   220→| ▾ 区域背景 | `bg-black/[0.015]` | `bg-white/[0.03]` |

   224→
   225→### Hamburger 图标

   229→| 容器 | `size-10 rounded-full bg-neutral-1` |
   230→| 线条宽度 | 14px |

   235→
   236→### 遮罩

 `./apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderDrawerContent.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     4→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→import { memo, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { useSheetContext } from '~/components/ui/sheet/context'
     8→import { reboundPreset } from '~/constants/spring'
     9→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    10→
    11→import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'
    12→import { useHeaderConfig } from './HeaderDataConfigureProvider'
    13→
    14→export const HeaderDrawerContent = () => {
    15→  const { config, ensureMenuData } = useHeaderConfig()
    16→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    17→
    18→  useEffect(() => {
    19→    ensureMenuData('Home')
    20→    ensureMenuData('Post')
    21→  }, [ensureMenuData])
    22→
    23→  const getTitle = useCallback(
    24→    (item: IHeaderMenu) => {
    25→      if (item.titleKey) {
    26→        return t(item.titleKey as any)
    27→      }
    28→      return item.title
    29→    },
    30→    [t],
    31→  )
    32→
    33→  return (
    34→    <div className="scrollbar-none mt-12 max-h-[80dvh] w-[90vw] space-y-4 overflow-auto pb-24">
    35→      {config.map((section, index) => {
    36→        let href = section.path
    37→        if (section.search) {
    38→          href += `?${new URLSearchParams(section.search).toString()}`
    39→        }
    40→
    41→        return (
    42→          <m.section
    43→            animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
    44→            initial={{ y: 30, opacity: 0 }}
    45→            key={href}
    46→            transition={{
    47→              ...reboundPreset,
    48→              delay: index * 0.08,
    49→            }}
    50→          >
    51→            <LinkInternal className="block" href={href}>
    52→              <span className="flex items-center space-x-2 py-2 text-lg">
    53→                <i>{section.icon}</i>
    54→                <h2>{getTitle(section)}</h2>
    55→              </span>
    56→            </LinkInternal>
    57→
    58→            {section.subMenu && (
    59→              <ul className="my-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
    60→                {section.subMenu.map((sub) => (
    61→                  <li key={sub.path}>
    62→                    <LinkInternal className="inline-block p-2" href={sub.path}>
    63→                      {getTitle(sub)}
    64→                    </LinkInternal>
    65→                  </li>
    66→                ))}
    67→              </ul>
    68→            )}
    69→          </m.section>
    70→        )
    71→      })}
    72→    </div>
    73→  )
    74→}
    75→
    76→const LinkInternal: typeof Link = memo(function LinkInternal({
    77→  children,
    78→  ...rest
    79→}) {
    80→  const { dismiss } = useSheetContext()
    81→  return (
    82→    <Link {...rest} onClick={dismiss}>
    83→      {children}
    84→    </Link>
    85→  )
    86→})
    87→
```

```text
     1→import { atom, useAtomValue, useSetAtom } from 'jotai'
     2→
     3→import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
     4→import { usePageScrollLocationSelector } from '~/providers/root/page-scroll-info-provider'
     5→
     6→const headerShouldShowBgAtom = atom(true)
     7→
     8→export const useHeaderShouldShowBg = () => useAtomValue(headerShouldShowBgAtom)
     9→export const useSetHeaderShouldShowBg = () => useSetAtom(headerShouldShowBgAtom)
    10→export const useMenuOpacity = () => {
    11→  const headerOpacity = useHeaderBgOpacity()
    12→
    13→  return 1 - headerOpacity
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const useHeaderBgOpacity = () => {
    17→  const threshold = 84 + 63 + 50
    18→  const distance = 50
    19→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    20→  const headerShouldShowBg = useHeaderShouldShowBg() || isMobile
    21→
    22→  return usePageScrollLocationSelector(
    23→    (y) => {
    24→      if (y < threshold) return 0
    25→      return headerShouldShowBg
    26→        ? y >= distance + threshold
    27→          ? 1
    28→          : Math.floor(((y - threshold) / distance) * 100) / 100
    29→        : 0
    30→    },
    31→    [headerShouldShowBg],
    32→  )
    33→}
    34→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderDataConfigureProvider.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     4→import { useLocale } from 'next-intl'
     5→import { createContext, use, useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { useAppConfigSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
     8→import { navigation } from '~/queries/definition/navigation'
     9→
    10→import { headerMenuConfig as baseHeaderMenuConfig } from '../config'
    11→import type {
    12→  HeaderCategoryNavItem,
    13→  HeaderPageNavItem,
    14→} from './nav-menu-data'
    15→import { applyDynamicHeaderMenuData } from './nav-menu-data'
    16→
    17→const HeaderMenuConfigContext = createContext({
    18→  config: baseHeaderMenuConfig,
    19→  categories: null as HeaderCategoryNavItem[] | null,
    20→  ensureMenuData: (_type: 'Home' | 'Post') => {},
    21→  pageMeta: null as HeaderPageNavItem[] | null,
    22→})
    23→
    24→export const useHeaderConfig = () => use(HeaderMenuConfigContext)
    25→
    26→export const HeaderDataConfigureProvider: Component = ({ children }) => {
    27→  const locale = useLocale()
    28→  const postListViewMode = useAppConfigSelector(
    29→    (appConfig) => appConfig.module?.posts?.mode,
    30→  )
    31→  const [shouldLoadHomeMenu, setShouldLoadHomeMenu] = useState(false)
    32→  const [shouldLoadPostMenu, setShouldLoadPostMenu] = useState(false)
    33→
    34→  const { data: pageMeta } = useQuery({
    35→    ...navigation.pages(locale),
    36→    enabled: shouldLoadHomeMenu,
    37→  })
    38→
    39→  const { data: postMenuData } = useQuery({
    40→    ...navigation.posts(locale),
    41→    enabled: shouldLoadPostMenu,
    42→  })
    43→
    44→  const categories = postMenuData?.categories || null
    45→
    46→  const ensureMenuData = useCallback((type: 'Home' | 'Post') => {
    47→    if (type === 'Home') {
    48→      setShouldLoadHomeMenu(true)
    49→      return
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    if (type === 'Post') {
    53→      setShouldLoadPostMenu(true)
    54→    }
    55→  }, [])
    56→
    57→  const headerMenuConfig = useMemo(
    58→    () =>
    59→      applyDynamicHeaderMenuData(baseHeaderMenuConfig, {
    60→        categories,
    61→        pageMeta,
    62→        postListViewMode,
    63→      }),
    64→    [categories, pageMeta, postListViewMode],
    65→  )
    66→
    67→  return (
    68→    <HeaderMenuConfigContext
    69→      value={useMemo(
    70→        () => ({
    71→          config: headerMenuConfig,
    72→          categories,
    73→          ensureMenuData,
    74→          pageMeta: pageMeta || null,
    75→        }),
    76→        [categories, ensureMenuData, headerMenuConfig, pageMeta],
    77→      )}
    78→    >
    79→      {children}
    80→    </HeaderMenuConfigContext>
    81→  )
    82→}
    83→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import './nav-menu.css'
     4→
     5→import { NavigationMenu } from '@base-ui/react/navigation-menu'
     6→import { AnimatePresence, LayoutGroup, m } from 'motion/react'
     7→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     8→import * as React from 'react'
     9→import { useCallback, useState } from 'react'
    10→
    11→import { RootPortal } from '~/components/ui/portal'
    12→import useDebounceValue from '~/hooks/common/use-debounce-value'
    13→import { Link, usePathname } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    14→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    15→import { useIsScrollUpAndPageIsOver } from '~/providers/root/page-scroll-info-provider'
    16→
    17→import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'
    18→import { dropdownTypeMap } from './DropdownContents'
    19→import { useHeaderConfig } from './HeaderDataConfigureProvider'
    20→import { useMenuOpacity } from './hooks'
    21→
    22→/** Debug: prevent menu from closing on focus loss (e.g. when opening DevTools). Enable via ?nav_debug=1 or localStorage.nav_debug */
    23→const useNavDebugMode = () => {
    24→  const [debug] = useState(() => {
    25→    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return false
    26→    return (
    27→      new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('nav_debug') === '1' ||
    28→      !!localStorage.getItem('nav_debug')
    29→    )
    30→  })
    31→  return debug
    32→}
    33→
    34→const NavSeparator = () => (
    35→  <div className="h-3.5 w-px shrink-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-black/[0.06] to-transparent dark:via-white/[0.06]" />
    36→)
    37→
    38→export const HeaderContent = () => (
    39→  <LayoutGroup>
    40→    <AnimatedMenu>
    41→      <ForDesktop />
    42→    </AnimatedMenu>
    43→    <AccessibleMenu />
    44→  </LayoutGroup>
    45→)
    46→
    47→const AccessibleMenu: Component = () => {
    48→  const showShow = useDebounceValue(useIsScrollUpAndPageIsOver(600), 120)
    49→  return (
    50→    <RootPortal>
    51→      <AnimatePresence>
    52→        {showShow && (
    53→          <m.div
    54→            animate={{ y: 0 }}
    55→            className="pointer-events-none fixed inset-x-0 top-4 z-10 mr-[var(--removed-body-scroll-bar-size)] flex justify-center"
    56→            exit={{ y: -20, opacity: 0 }}
    57→            initial={{ y: -20 }}
    58→          >
    59→            <ForDesktop />
    60→          </m.div>
    61→        )}
    62→      </AnimatePresence>
    63→    </RootPortal>
    64→  )
    65→}
    66→
    67→const AnimatedMenu: Component = ({ children }) => {
    68→  const opacity = useMenuOpacity()
    69→
    70→  const shouldHideNavBg = opacity === 0
    71→  return (
    72→    <m.div
    73→      className="duration-100"
    74→      style={{
    75→        opacity,
    76→        visibility: opacity === 0 ? 'hidden' : 'visible',
    77→      }}
    78→    >
    79→      {/* @ts-ignore */}
    80→      {React.cloneElement(children, { shouldHideNavBg })}
    81→    </m.div>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→
    85→const ForDesktop: Component<{
    86→  shouldHideNavBg?: boolean
    87→  animatedIcon?: boolean
    88→}> = ({ className, shouldHideNavBg, animatedIcon = true }) => {
    89→  const { config: headerMenuConfig, ensureMenuData } = useHeaderConfig()
    90→  const pathname = usePathname()
    91→  const t = useTranslations('common')
    92→  const navDebugMode = useNavDebugMode()
    93→
    94→  const [menuValue, setMenuValue] = useState<string | null>(null)
    95→  const handleValueChange = useCallback(
    96→    (value: string | null) => {
    97→      if (navDebugMode && value == null) return
    98→      if (value) {
    99→        const section = headerMenuConfig.find((item) => item.path === value)
   100→        if (section?.type === 'Home' || section?.type === 'Post') {
   101→          ensureMenuData(section.type)
   102→        }
   103→      }
   104→      setMenuValue(value)
   105→    },
   106→    [ensureMenuData, headerMenuConfig, navDebugMode],
   107→  )
   108→
   109→  const getTitle = useCallback(
   110→    (item: IHeaderMenu) => {
   111→      if (item.titleKey) {
   112→        return t(item.titleKey as any)
   113→      }
   114→      return item.title
   115→    },
   116→    [t],
   117→  )
   118→
   119→  return (
   120→    <NavigationMenu.Root
   121→      closeDelay={150}
   122→      delay={80}
   123→      render={<m.nav layout="size" />}
   124→      value={menuValue}
   125→      className={clsxm(
   126→        'relative',
   127→        'rounded-sm',
   128→        'bg-white/[0.38] dark:bg-neutral-900/[0.38] backdrop-blur-lg',
   129→        'border border-[rgba(200,180,160,0.08)] dark:border-neutral-700/20',
   130→        'pointer-events-auto duration-200',
   131→        shouldHideNavBg && 'bg-none! border-transparent!',
   132→        className,
   133→      )}
   134→      onValueChange={handleValueChange}
   135→    >
   136→      <NavigationMenu.List className="flex list-none items-center px-2 font-medium text-neutral-9">
   137→        {headerMenuConfig.map((section, index) => {
   138→          const DropdownContent = section.type
   139→            ? dropdownTypeMap[section.type]
   140→            : undefined
   141→
   142→          const subItemActive =
   143→            section.subMenu?.findIndex(
   144→              (item) =>
   145→                item.path === pathname ||
   146→                pathname.slice(1) === item.path ||
   147→                pathname.startsWith(`${item.path}/`),
   148→            ) ?? -1
   149→
   150→          const isActive =
   151→            pathname === section.path ||
   152→            (pathname.startsWith(`${section.path}/`) &&
   153→              !section.exclude?.includes(pathname)) ||
   154→            subItemActive > -1 ||
   155→            false
   156→
   157→          const activeSubItem = section.subMenu?.[subItemActive]
   158→
   159→          let href = section.path
   160→          if (section.search) {
   161→            href += `?${new URLSearchParams(section.search).toString()}`
   162→          }
   163→
   164→          const activeClass =
   165→            'text-neutral-9 bg-white/55 dark:bg-white/[0.06] shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] dark:shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] rounded-[2px] m-0.5'
   166→          const inactiveClass = 'text-neutral-7 hover:text-neutral-9'
   167→
   168→          let menuItem: React.ReactNode
   169→
   170→          if (DropdownContent) {
   171→            menuItem = (
   172→              <NavigationMenu.Item value={section.path}>
   173→                <NavigationMenu.Trigger
   174→                  nativeButton={false}
   175→                  render={<Link href={href} onClick={section.do} />}
   176→                  className={clsxm(
   177→                    'relative inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center whitespace-nowrap border-none bg-transparent px-3 py-1.5 transition duration-200',
   178→                    isActive ? activeClass : inactiveClass,
   179→                  )}
   180→                >
   181→                  <span className="relative flex items-center">
   182→                    {isActive && (
   183→                      <m.span
   184→                        className="mr-2 flex items-center"
   185→                        layoutId={animatedIcon ? 'header-menu-icon' : undefined}
   186→                      >
   187→                        {activeSubItem?.icon ?? section.icon}
   188→                      </m.span>
   189→                    )}
   190→                    <m.span layout>
   191→                      {activeSubItem
   192→                        ? getTitle(activeSubItem)
   193→                        : getTitle(section)}
   194→                    </m.span>
   195→                  </span>
   196→                </NavigationMenu.Trigger>
   197→                <NavigationMenu.Content className="nav-menu-content">
   198→                  <DropdownContent section={section} />
   199→                </NavigationMenu.Content>
   200→              </NavigationMenu.Item>
   201→            )
   202→          } else {
   203→            const isExternal = href.startsWith('http')
   204→            menuItem = (
   205→              <NavigationMenu.Item>
   206→                <NavigationMenu.Link
   207→                  active={isActive}
   208→                  className={clsxm(
   209→                    'relative block whitespace-nowrap px-3 py-1.5 transition duration-200',
   210→                    isActive ? activeClass : inactiveClass,
   211→                  )}
   212→                  render={
   213→                    isExternal ? (
   214→                      <a href={href} target="_blank" />
   215→                    ) : (
   216→                      <Link href={href} onClick={section.do} />
   217→                    )
   218→                  }
   219→                >
   220→                  <span className="relative flex items-center">
   221→                    {isActive && (
   222→                      <m.span
   223→                        className="mr-2 flex items-center"
   224→                        layoutId={animatedIcon ? 'header-menu-icon' : undefined}
   225→                      >
   226→                        {activeSubItem?.icon ?? section.icon}
   227→                      </m.span>
   228→                    )}
   229→                    <m.span layout>
   230→                      {activeSubItem
   231→                        ? getTitle(activeSubItem)
   232→                        : getTitle(section)}
   233→                    </m.span>
   234→                  </span>
   235→                </NavigationMenu.Link>
   236→              </NavigationMenu.Item>
   237→            )
   238→          }
   239→
   240→          return (
   241→            <React.Fragment key={section.path}>
   242→              {index > 0 && <NavSeparator />}
   243→              {menuItem}
   244→            </React.Fragment>
   245→          )
   246→        })}
   247→      </NavigationMenu.List>
   248→
   249→      <NavigationMenu.Portal>
   250→        <NavigationMenu.Positioner
   251→          className="nav-menu-positioner"
   252→          positionMethod="fixed"

# Mobile Header 融合浮片 Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (if subagents available) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Replace the mobile header's bottom-sheet drawer (Vaul) with a top-down "fused floating card" that merges with the header, using tag-based navigation with split buttons for sub-menus.

**Architecture:** Rewrite `HeaderDrawerButton.tsx` as the mobile menu orchestrator (state, overlay, merged card, a11y) and `HeaderDrawerContent.tsx` as the tag-based navigation panel. Render via `RootPortal` to overlay the page. No changes to `Header.tsx`, desktop nav, or config.

**Tech Stack:** React 19, Motion (Framer Motion), Tailwind CSS v4, next-intl, clsxm

---

## Chunk 1: Mobile Menu Rewrite

### Task 1: Rewrite HeaderDrawerButton

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderDrawerButton.tsx`

This task replaces the PresentSheet-based drawer with a custom top-down panel. The component becomes the full mobile menu orchestrator: hamburger icon with CSS animation, overlay, merged floating card, a11y, scroll lock, escape key, and auto-close on navigation.

- [ ] **Step 1: Rewrite HeaderDrawerButton.tsx**

Replace the entire file content:

\```tsx
'use client'

import { AnimatePresence, m } from 'motion/react'
import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
import type { CSSProperties } from 'react'
import { createContext, use, useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'

import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
import { RootPortal } from '~/components/ui/portal'
import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'
import { usePathname } from '~/i18n/navigation'
import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'

import { AnimatedLogo } from './AnimatedLogo'
import { HeaderDrawerContent } from './HeaderDrawerContent'
import { useMenuOpacity } from './hooks'
import { UserAuth } from './UserAuth'

export const MobileMenuContext = createContext({ close: () => {} })
export const useMobileMenu = () => use(MobileMenuContext)

export const HeaderDrawerButton = () => {
  const t = useTranslations('common')
  const isClient = useIsClient()
  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
  const menuOpacity = useMenuOpacity()
  const pathname = usePathname()

  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)

  const close = useCallback(() => setIsOpen(false), [])
  const toggle = useCallback(() => setIsOpen((prev) => !prev), [])

  // Auto-close on route change
  useEffect(() => {
    setIsOpen(false)
  }, [pathname])

  // Body scroll lock
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isOpen) return
    const prev = document.body.style.overflow
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'
    return () => {
      document.body.style.overflow = prev
    }
  }, [isOpen])

  // Escape key
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isOpen) return
    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') close()
    }
    document.addEventListener('keydown', handler)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handler)
  }, [isOpen, close])

  const opacityStyle: CSSProperties | undefined =
    isMobile && menuOpacity !== undefined
      ? {
          opacity: menuOpacity,
          visibility: menuOpacity === 0 ? 'hidden' : 'visible',
        }
      : undefined

  const buttonLabel = isOpen
    ? t('aria_header_drawer_close')
    : t('aria_header_drawer')

  return (
    <>
      {/* Hamburger / Close button */}
      <button
        aria-controls="mobile-nav-panel"
        aria-expanded={isOpen}
        aria-label={buttonLabel}
        className={clsxm(
          'group size-10 rounded-full bg-neutral-1',
          'text-sm ring-1 ring-neutral-9/5 transition',
          'flex items-center justify-center',
        )}
        style={opacityStyle}
        onClick={toggle}
      >
        <HamburgerIcon isOpen={isOpen} />
      </button>

      {/* Mobile menu overlay + merged card */}
      {isClient && (
        <RootPortal>
          <AnimatePresence>
            {isOpen && (
              <MobileMenuContext value={{ close }}>
                {/* Overlay */}
                <m.div
                  animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
                  className="fixed inset-0 z-[19] bg-black/[0.06] dark:bg-black/[0.3]"
                  exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
                  initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
                  transition={{ duration: 0.15 }}
                  onClick={close}
                />

                {/* Merged floating card */}
                <m.div
                  animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
                  className={clsxm(
                    'fixed inset-x-0 top-0 z-[20] mx-2 mt-2',
                    'rounded-sm',
                    'bg-[var(--color-root-bg)] dark:bg-neutral-900',
                    'border border-[rgba(200,180,160,0.12)] dark:border-neutral-700/20',
                    'shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06),0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]',
                    'dark:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)]',
                  )}
                  exit={{ y: '-100%', opacity: 0 }}
                  id="mobile-nav-panel"
                  initial={{ y: '-100%', opacity: 0 }}
                  role="dialog"
                  transition={{
                    duration: 0.2,
                    ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1],
                  }}
                >
                  {/* Header row inside the card */}
                  <div className="flex h-[4.5rem] items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-black/[0.03] dark:border-white/[0.03]">
                    <button
                      aria-label={t('aria_header_drawer_close')}
                      className={clsxm(
                        'size-10 rounded-full bg-neutral-1',
                        'ring-1 ring-neutral-9/5 transition',
                        'flex items-center justify-center',
                      )}
                      onClick={close}
                    >
                      <HamburgerIcon isOpen />
                    </button>

                    <AnimatedLogo />

                    <UserAuth />
                  </div>

                  {/* Navigation panel */}
                  <HeaderDrawerContent />
                </m.div>
              </MobileMenuContext>
            )}
          </AnimatePresence>
        </RootPortal>
      )}
    </>
  )
}

/** CSS-based hamburger icon with animated ☰ ↔ × transition */
const HamburgerIcon = ({ isOpen }: { isOpen: boolean }) => {
  const base =
    'block h-[1.5px] w-3.5 rounded-full bg-neutral-7 transition-all duration-200'
  const ease = '[transition-timing-function:cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]'

  return (
    <span className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1">
      <span
        className={clsxm(
          base,
          ease,
          isOpen && 'translate-y-[2.75px] rotate-45',
        )}
      />
      <span
        className={clsxm(base, ease, isOpen && 'opacity-0')}
      />
      <span
        className={clsxm(
          base,
          ease,
          isOpen && '-translate-y-[2.75px] -rotate-45',
        )}
      />
    </span>
  )
}
\```

**Key decisions:**
- `RootPortal` renders overlay + card above everything (z-19/20, below header's z-[9] is fine since the card is fixed on top)
- `MobileMenuContext` provides `close` to child links
- Hamburger icon uses 3 `<span>` elements with CSS transforms (top/bottom rotate ±45deg, middle fades out)
- `translate-y-[2.75px]` = gap(4px)/2 + lineHeight(1.5px)/2 = 2.75px to converge at center
- Body scroll lock via direct `overflow` manipulation (simple, no library needed)
- `usePathname()` change triggers auto-close
